slideshows_uploaded.title: Beginner Functional Programming Workshop
slideshows_uploaded.description:
Basic introduction to functional programming through a functional language.

I prepared it with the goal of not scaring anyone, while still using a language that coworkers had shown mutual interest in.

Classes were given between January and February 2020.
